title: Nio posts lower-than-expected Q3 revenue, gross margin improves
text: Revenue reached RMB 18.67 billion ($2.66 billion), down 2.1% year-over-year, up 7.0% from Q2 2024, falling short of analyst expectations (RMB 19.17 billion) and company guidance (RMB 19.11-19.67 billion). Vehicle deliveries totaled 61,855 units, up 11.59% year-over-year, up 7.81% from Q2, within guidance range of 61,000-63,000. Gross margin improved to 10.7%, highest since Q3 2022, up from 9.7% in Q2 2024. Vehicle margin improved to 13.1%. Net loss reached RMB 5.06 billion, relatively flat compared to Q2 2024. For Q4 2024 guidance: deliveries 72,000-75,000 units (43.9%-49.9% year-over-year growth); revenue RMB 19.68-20.38 billion (15.0%-19.2% growth). CFO Stanley Qu noted free cash flow turned positive.
